title: Candidate
description: A raw event observation that is being considered for the Pilot research pipeline.

candidate_id.description: Unique identifier for this candidate record.

information_form.description: The information form of the raw observation.

capture_time_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the raw observation was captured.

source_observation_ref.description: Reference back to the source Observation or raw event record.

status.description: Current routing or exclusion status of this candidate.

exclusion_reason.description: Required when status is 'excluded' or 'insufficient_information'. Explains why the candidate was not routed.

candidate_log.description: Complete audit log of all actions taken on this candidate. No silent deletion allowed.
